case_title: STATHIS MARAGOS VS. JOHN LIANG, et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-21-2008 - JUDGMENT. (1) SUNRISE AUTO SERVICE, INC. APPEARS, AND WAIVES SERVICE OF PROCESS AND NOTICE OF TRIAL. (2) DEFENDANT JOHN LIANG DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE-IMPROPERLY NAMED AS PARTY. (3) ALTHOUGH THE COURT DOES NOT AWARD MONEY DAMAGES, PLAINTIFF MAY RETURN TO DEFENDANT SUNRISE AUTO SERVICE INC. FOR A REPLACEMENT OF DEFECTIVE STEERING BOX WITH A REPLACEMENT, AFTER-MARKET (NON-OEM) PART WITHOUT CHARGE BY DEFENDANT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $875.10 FILED BY MARAGOS, STATHIS AS TO DEFENDANT LIANG, JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-28-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARAGOS, STATHIS AS TO DEFENDANT LIANG, JOHN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-22-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LIANG, JOHN
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-21-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-21-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHN LIANG PRESENT. TAI TSANG INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CHINIESE, CHINESE/ENGLISH ON DEFENDANTS BEHALF. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT SUNRISE AUTO. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
CASE DISMISSED WITHPREJUDICE AS TO JOHN LIANG BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF APR-21-2008 AT 5:30PM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARAGOS, STATHIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUNRISE AUTO SERVICE, INC. $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $40.00, (1) DEFENDANT SUNRISE AUTO SERVICE, INC. APPEARS, AND WAIVES SERVICE OF PROCESS AND NOTICE OF TRIAL. (2) DEFENDANT JOHN LIANG DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE-IMPROPERLY NAMED AS PARTY. (3)ALTHOUGH THE COURT DOES NOT AWARD MONEY DAMAGES, PLAINTIFF MAY RETURN TO DEFENDANT SUNRISE AUTO SERVICE INC. FOR A REPLACEMENT OF THE DEFECTIVE STEERING BOX WITH A REPLACEMENT, AFTER-MARKET (NON-OEM) PART WITHOUT CHARGES BY DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-28-2008 - CONTINUED TO APR-21-2008 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 ON COURT'S OWN MOTION PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS AMENDED TO ADD SUNRISE AUTO SERVICE, INC. AS DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF SHALL SERVE NEW DEFENDANT PRIOR TO HEARING. DEFENDANT LIANG SHALL APPEAR WITH AN INTERPRETER. PLAINTIFF PRESENT; DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT; CLERK;S. VANTREE; NOT REPORTED (506)
